name: AOS — Animate on Scroll
description: Triggers fade, slide, flip, and 3D zoom animations as sections scroll into view. Auto-applies to headings, cards, and section content.
head: <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.css" />
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aos@2.3.4/dist/aos.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var selectors = [
      { sel: 'h1, h2, h3',                  anim: 'fade-up',    delay: 0   },
      { sel: '.card, .service-card',         anim: 'zoom-in',    delay: 100 },
      { sel: '.feature-card',                anim: 'fade-up',    delay: 150 },
      { sel: 'section p, .section-subtitle', anim: 'fade-up',    delay: 50  },
      { sel: '.testimonial, .review-card',   anim: 'flip-left',  delay: 0   }
    ];
    selectors.forEach(function (item) {
      document.querySelectorAll(item.sel).forEach(function (el, i) {
        if (!el.hasAttribute('data-aos')) {
          el.setAttribute('data-aos', item.anim);
          el.setAttribute('data-aos-delay', String(item.delay + (i % 3) * 80));
          el.setAttribute('data-aos-duration', '650');
          el.setAttribute('data-aos-once', 'true');
        }
      });
    });
    AOS.init({ offset: 80, once: true });
  });
</script>
